summary: PR #2503 improved matching in src/melee/lb/lbcollision by matching lbColl_80005C44 and lbColl_80009DD4, improving several nearby collision/debug draw helpers, fixing lbColl_80006E58 argument ordering so collision distance is written through an explicit output parameter, and updating stale lbcollision.h prototypes. The bot report records +1016 matched-code bytes, 2 new matches, and 7 unmatched-item improvements.

what_changed.text: Changed lbColl_80006E58's parameter order so float* arg8 comes after scl, arg10, and arg11; the PR body says this fixes collision distance being written through the explicit output parameter.

what_changed.text: Reworked Vec3 temporaries in several functions from scalar spXXX slots or component-by-component assignments into Vec3 copies such as Vec3 a0 = *a, Vec3 a1 = a0, sp11C = *arg0, and sp110 = *arg2.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: lbColl_800067F8 uses Vec3 a0 = *a and Vec3 a1 = a0
diff_excerpt: lbColl_80006E58 replaces scalar sp124/sp120/sp11C etc. with Vec3 sp11C, sp110, sp104
diff_excerpt: lbColl_80006094 uses Vec3 vec4 = *arg0 and Vec3 vec2 = *arg2

what_changed.text: Adjusted stack padding in in-progress functions: lbColl_80006094 PAD_STACK changed 64 to 56, lbColl_800067F8 changed to PAD_STACK(24), and lbColl_80006E58 changed 144 to 112.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: PAD_STACK changes in lbColl_80006094, lbColl_800067F8, lbColl_80006E58

what_changed.text: Added local .sdata/.rodata-related symbols and a local inline lbColl_JObjGetMtxPtr that asserts jobj.h line 1144, calls HSD_JObjSetupMatrix, and returns jobj->mtx.

accepted_candidate_records.title: lbcollision Vec3 temporary layout affects matching
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR #2503 records that several lbcollision helpers still share a by-value Vec3 temporary layout mismatch, while the diff changes multiple functions from component scalars to Vec3 copies. For lbcollision geometry helpers, consider Vec3 copy layout a first-class matching variable before treating remaining stack drift as unrelated.

source_update_candidates.text: PR #2503 paired a recovered lbColl_80006E58 argument-order fix with stale lbcollision.h prototype updates. This supports the existing truthful-headers-and-includes standard: when a body proves an output-parameter or signature order, update the owning header rather than leaving stale prototypes.

source_update_candidates.title: Treat volatile literal/data loads as narrow matching tactics requiring evidence
source_update_candidates.text: The diff uses volatile const float/f64 loads from lbColl data symbols for nearzero and scale limits. Because this can overlap with data/literal ownership risk, curator may want to cross-reference this PR under matching-tactics-need-evidence and literals-and-data-ownership rather than promoting it as normal style.
